column2: Test Case: Requesting Insurance and Ground Survey Approval
column3: ['Log in as a CAA Authorization Officer to the system. ', 'Request insurance for a UAS operation with acceptable risks. ', 'Request ground survey for the same UAS operation. ', 'Verify that both requests are processed by the system. ']
column4: ['Successfully log in with valid credentials. ', "The request is submitted and visible within the system's interface. ", "Another request is submitted, and it appears alongside the initial insurance request in the system's interface. ", 'The system returns an approval message indicating that both insurance and ground survey have been approved. ']
